title: hieracium rohacsense subsp. gletschense
intro: Hieracium rohacsense subsp. gletschense, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the European Alps, to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium rohacsense subsp. gletschense include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and treating kidney stones, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used as teas, tonics, or applied topically as poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
